{# Vendor list partial — sortable table with blacklisted toggle and cadence clocks. Receives: vendors, q, hide_blacklisted, sort, dir, total, limit, offset, now_utc, view, my_only, hx_target, push_url_base. Each vendor has .cadence_state attached by the route (tier=None → standard 30d). Called by: vendors_list_partial route. Depends on: accent palette (post-PR0), timeago filter. #} {% from "htmx/partials/shared/_macros.html" import badge, cadence_dot %}
{# ── Page header: title + primary CTA ────────────────────────────────────── #}

Vendors

{{ total }} vendor{{ "s" if total != 1 }}

Contacts {# Export CSV — a REAL browser download, not an htmx request: hx-boost="false" opts this anchor out of the app's global nav-boost so it does a plain GET that streams the file as an attachment (never swapping into #main-content). The querystring is server-rendered from the SAME filter context the list used, so the CSV mirrors exactly what's on screen (every filter change re-renders this whole partial). #} Export CSV
{# Upload stock list modal — uploads a vendor's stock list (CSV/TSV/XLSX) for a named vendor and ingests the rows (MPN, qty, price, condition…) via the shared stock-list ingest. Result HTML is swapped into #vendor-stock-result. #}

Upload stock list

Upload a vendor's stock list (CSV, TSV, or Excel) with a header row including columns like mpn, qty, price, manufacturer, condition. Rows are ingested as parts with this vendor's stock.

Uploading…
{# Sub-tab bar: All Vendors / My Vendors Active state: accent underline + accent-700 text (mirrors the CRM shell tab bar). #}
All Vendors My Vendors
{# Filter bar — .card wraps chrome so it matches the rest of the app. #}
{% if my_only %}{% endif %}
{# Card grid view #} {% if view == 'cards' and vendors %}
{% for v in vendors %} {% include "htmx/partials/vendors/vendor_card.html" %} {% endfor %}
{% endif %} {# Table view — .table-wrapper + .data-table for consistent density and accent chrome. #} {% if view != 'cards' and vendors %}
{# Cadence dot column — no label, narrow #} {% for col_name, col_key in [('Vendor', 'display_name'), ('Score', None), ('Sightings', 'sighting_count'), ('Win Rate', 'overall_win_rate'), ('Location', 'hq_country'), ('Industry', 'industry')] %} {% endfor %} {% for v in vendors %} {# Cadence dot #} {# Dual cadence clocks #} {% endfor %}
{% if col_key %} {{ col_name }} {% if sort == col_key %} {% endif %} {% else %} {{ col_name }} {% endif %} Cadence
{{ cadence_dot(v.cadence_state) }}

{{ v.display_name }}

{% if v.domain %}

{{ v.domain }}

{% endif %}
{% if v.is_blacklisted %} {{ badge('Blacklisted', 'danger') }} {% elif not v.is_active %} {{ badge('Archived', 'neutral') }} {% elif v.vendor_score %} {{ "%.0f"|format(v.vendor_score) }} {% else %} — {% endif %} {{ v.sighting_count or 0 }} {{ "%.0f%%"|format(v.overall_win_rate * 100) if v.overall_win_rate else "—" }} {{ v.hq_country or "—" }} {{ v.industry or "—" }}

Out {{ v.last_outbound_at|timeago if v.last_outbound_at else "never" }}

Reply {{ v.last_reply_at|timeago if v.last_reply_at else "—" }}

{# Pagination #} {% if total > limit %}
{% if offset > 0 %} Prev {% endif %} {{ offset + 1 }}–{{ [offset + limit, total]|min }} of {{ total }} {% if offset + limit < total %} Next {% endif %}
{% endif %} {% endif %} {# Empty state — .card matches the rest of the app chrome (P5.3: shared partial). #} {% if not vendors %} {% with message="No vendors found", message_class="mt-2 text-sm text-gray-600", wrapper_class="card p-6 sm:p-8 text-center", icon_class="mx-auto h-12 w-12 text-gray-400", icon_path="M19 21V5a2 2 0 00-2-2H7a2 2 0 00-2 2v16m14 0h2m-2 0h-5m-9 0H3m2 0h5M9 7h1m-1 4h1m4-4h1m-1 4h1m-5 10v-5a1 1 0 011-1h2a1 1 0 011 1v5m-4 0h4" %} {% include "htmx/partials/shared/empty_state.html" %} {% endwith %} {% endif %}
